description: issue #208: `set_background "reddish"` is not one of the three accepted color forms, so it raises `ol-bad-color` (spec/error-model.md:122) instead of emitting a `background-change` event.

diagnostics.message: set_background needs a color word, an [r g b] list, or a "#rrggbb" hex word, but got reddish.
